disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Greasy yellow scale on red skin in a seborrhoeic distribution (scalp, nasolabial folds, brows, chest) with crusting at the eyelash bases
trigger_question_examples: Is the scale greasy and yellow (not dry silvery), on the scalp/sides of the nose/eyebrows/chest, with crusting on the eyelash bases?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, greasy yellow scale on my scalp, sides of the nose, brows and chest, with crusting on the eyelash bases; it flares with stress and winter.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Eyes only mildly red with crusting; NO severe eye pain, marked light sensitivity or blurred vision (serious-eye screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any severe eye pain, sensitivity to bright light, or blurred vision?
Is it just lid crusting or is the eye itself very painful/vision affected?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's mainly lid crusting; my eyes are a bit red but no severe pain, no light sensitivity and my vision is normal.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No clustered punched-out monomorphic erosions, no hot/hard spreading facial swelling, no fever (eczema-herpeticum/periorbital-infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any clusters of small identical punched-out sores, or hot hard spreading facial swelling with fever?
Is the swelling around your eye hot and hard?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No punched-out sores, no hot hard spreading swelling and no fever — just greasy scaly patches and crusty lids.
